items.caption: A flat isometric illustration of a retirement fund concept. at the center, there's a large glass jar filled with coins, symbolizing savings. on top of the jar, there's a small island with a palm tree and two beach chairs, where an elderly couple is relaxing, suggesting a peaceful retirement. the background is a solid pink color, and there are white clouds and a yellow sun in the sky, adding to the serene atmosphere. the text "retirement fund" is prominently displayed in the upper right corner, reinforcing the theme of the image.
